# Shelterwood Holdings

> Shelterwood Holdings is a Canadian holding company building a portfolio of
> AI-native businesses from Toronto, Canada. We target industries ready for
> transformation — applying artificial intelligence to solve real problems
> for real people. Founded by Peter Cresswell, a systems engineer with 20+
> years in Canadian healthcare IT.

## About

- [About Shelterwood](https://shelterwood.ca/about/): Our approach, philosophy, and the meaning behind the name.

## Key Facts

- Incorporated federally in Canada as Shelterwood Holdings Inc.
- Headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, Canada
- Focus areas: healthcare IT, AI-native software, Canadian market
- Business model: portfolio of AI-native lifestyle businesses
- Founded: 2026
